headline: Kimco Realty Stock Rises 9.4% in 3 Months: Will the Momentum Last?
summary: KIM gains 9.4% on grocery-anchored strength and suburban focus, as rising FFO estimates and mixed-use strategy boost growth outlook.

raw.headline: Kimco Realty Stock Rises 9.4% in 3 Months: Will the Momentum Last?
raw.summary: KIM gains 9.4% on grocery-anchored strength and suburban focus, as rising FFO estimates and mixed-use strategy boost growth outlook.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Kimco Realty, Raises Price Target to $23
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Ki Bin Kim   maintains Kimco Realty (NYSE:KIM) with a Hold and raises the price target from $22 to $23.
